title: nolana laxa
intro: Nolana laxa is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the Chilean shrub evening primrose. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nolana laxa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Nolana laxa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
